_comment: MCP server catalog. Launch config per server. Enable via USE_MCP_TOOLS=true + per-server 'enabled' flag. Paths use placeholders: ${PROJECT_DIR}, ${WORKSPACE_ROOT}.

filesystem.description: Reference filesystem MCP server from @modelcontextprotocol. Scoped to current project dir.

git.description: Reference git MCP server. Enable once we have repo-inside-project-dir pattern.

github.description: GitHub MCP server. Needs GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN env. For Phase 10 Courier.

postgres.description: Postgres MCP for Phase 7 memory layer and Phase 12 admin.
